payload.summary: Added DB-focused readiness tests in the health service test suite to enforce gating on database availability before implementation.

targetedCommand.name: Full test script execution
targetedCommand.purpose: Run the repository's canonical test entrypoint to validate the readiness-gating harness, which should fail until production code is updated.

payload.expectedFailure: HealthService currently reports readiness true whenever the process is running, so DB-unavailable/rejecting paths are not reflected in readiness.
